chapter: ENG10_7 – The Tale of Custard the Dragon
title: The Tale of Custard the Dragon – Easy SAQs

questions.question: Who wrote the poem 'The Tale of Custard the Dragon'?
questions.answer: The poem was written by Ogden Nash.

questions.question: Where did Belinda live?
questions.answer: Belinda lived in a little white house.

questions.question: Name Belinda’s pets.
questions.answer: Belinda’s pets were Ink the kitten, Blink the mouse, Mustard the dog, and Custard the dragon.

questions.question: Why was Custard called a cowardly dragon?
questions.answer: Custard was called cowardly because he always cried for a nice safe cage.

questions.question: How is Belinda described in the poem?
questions.answer: Belinda is described as very brave, as brave as a barrel full of bears.

questions.question: How is Mustard described in the poem?
questions.answer: Mustard is described as brave as a tiger in a rage.

questions.question: What does Custard look like?
questions.answer: Custard had big sharp teeth, spikes on top, scales underneath, and daggers on his toes.

questions.question: Why did Belinda and the pets laugh at Custard?
questions.answer: They laughed at Custard because they thought he was cowardly.

questions.question: What sudden event happened in the poem?
questions.answer: A pirate suddenly entered Belinda’s house through the window.

questions.question: How did Belinda react when she saw the pirate?
questions.answer: Belinda turned pale and cried for help.

questions.question: What did Mustard do when the pirate appeared?
questions.answer: Mustard ran away with a terrified yelp.

questions.question: Where did Blink hide during the danger?
questions.answer: Blink hid in a mousehole.

questions.question: Who fought the pirate?
questions.answer: Custard the dragon fought the pirate.

questions.question: How did Custard attack the pirate?
questions.answer: Custard jumped up and attacked the pirate fiercely.

questions.question: What happened to the pirate in the end?
questions.answer: Custard gobbled up the pirate.

questions.question: How did Belinda react after the pirate was defeated?
questions.answer: Belinda hugged and embraced Custard.

questions.question: What did Mustard do after the fight?
questions.answer: Mustard licked Custard.

questions.question: What did Ink and Blink do after the pirate was defeated?
questions.answer: Ink and Blink danced around Custard happily.

questions.question: What excuse did Mustard give later?
questions.answer: Mustard said he would have been braver if he had not been flustered.

questions.question: What did Ink and Blink claim later?
questions.answer: They claimed they would have been three times as brave.

questions.question: What did Custard say about himself after the incident?
questions.answer: Custard said that everyone was braver than him.

questions.question: What type of poem is 'The Tale of Custard the Dragon'?
questions.answer: It is a humorous ballad.

questions.question: What literary device is used in 'as brave as a tiger in a rage'?
questions.answer: It is a simile.

questions.question: What is the main message of the poem?
questions.answer: The poem shows that true courage is revealed through actions.

questions.question: Who is the real hero of the poem?
questions.answer: Custard the dragon is the real hero.
